arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are currently in the midst of a rebuilding job as Ange Postecoglou looks to mould his team into a world-class outfit. Since Postecoglou...

arts.ttl: Tottenham wonderkid joins in training as James Maddison teases Son and throws top at Sarr
arts.sum: Tottenham were out on the cold Hotspur Way pitches on Wednesday as the players trained in preparation for the Europa League match against Roma. The available players for the Europa League game plus a couple of unregistered ones were training at Hotspur Way on Wednesday and football.london were present to watch the opening stages of the session.

arts.sum: Tottenham teenager could break all-time Spurs record vs Roma

arts.ttl: Thursday's Transfer Talk Update: Guglielmo Vicario, Fraser Forster, Rasmus Hojlund
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Claudio Ranieri Reflects on Retirement: “Only Roma or Cagliari Could Bring Me Back”
arts.sum: Roma manager Claudio Ranieri addressed the media in the build-up to today's UEFA Europa League game against Tottenham Hotspur. It's a must-win clash for the Giallorossi as their hopes of locking down automatic knockout qualification hang in the balance. The post Claudio Ranieri Reflects on Retirement: “Only Roma or Cagliari Could Bring Me Back” appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.sum: Spurs take on Roma for the first time in a competitive fixture

arts.ttl: Tottenham guaranteed to be without nine players vs Roma as Cristian Romero return hint dropped
arts.sum: Injuries have hit Spurs hard in recent weeks and that in turn has left the head coach with limited options to pick from when it comes to his team selection. Tottenham head into their latest Europa League game sitting seventh in the 36-team league after four fixtures.

arts.ttl: Spurs goalkeeper Vicario out for months - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham goalkeeper Guglielmo Vicario is out for "months, not weeks" with an ankle injury, Ange Postecoglou confirms.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Roma: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Tottenham host Roma in the Europa League on Thursday. Preview includes team news, how to watch on TV, predicted lineups and more.
